title: Gen Mariano Alvarez Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting General Mariano Alvarez with a Z-Score of +4.91. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10, causing extreme discomfort to residents and visitors. 
 The city's Cooling Degree Days (CDD) has reached 16.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems. 
 The relative humidity is at 49% and the wind speed is at 7.2 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
